name: HWR_OSN_CONV_POST_B
description: This table will be used to store information regarding Posts in the OSN conversations used in Like subcomponent of Ask the Question feature.

columns.Name: OSN_ID
columns.Comments: This is the ID of the OSN conversation for the OSN Post Like feature in the Ask a Question feature.

columns.Name: POST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Post Id associated with the OSN conversation.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Fusion Id of the person who published  the post.

columns.Name: LIKE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of people who have liked this post for the corresponding OSN conversation.

columns.Name: CONV_POST_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: CONV_POST_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CONV_POST_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: CONV_POST_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CONV_POST_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: CONV_POST_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CONV_POST_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: CONV_POST_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
